prompt: 我有一张产品图（一款白色陶瓷咖啡杯），想做一个 10 秒的产品展示广告。需要从纯黑背景中旋转出场，展示杯身纹理细节，最后杯中倒入热咖啡冒出蒸汽。横屏 16:9，极简高级感。产品正面图作为 @图片1，杯身纹理细节图作为 @图片2。

assertions.name: multiple_versions
assertions.check: response.md contains '版本一', '版本二', and optionally '版本三' sections

assertions.name: multimodal_refs
assertions.check: response.md contains '@图片1' and '@图片2' with proper usage

assertions.name: camera_orbit
assertions.description: Includes Orbit or rotation camera movement
assertions.check: response.md contains 'Orbit' or '旋转' for product showcase

assertions.name: camera_zoom
assertions.description: Includes Zoom In for texture detail
assertions.check: response.md contains 'Zoom In' or '推进' for texture

assertions.name: material_reference_list
assertions.check: response.md has reference section mapping @图片N to descriptions

assertions.name: file_count_check
assertions.check: response.md mentions file count ≤ 12 or shows exactly 2 files

assertions.name: no_human_faces
assertions.description: Does not include realistic human faces
assertions.check: response.md does not describe realistic human faces

assertions.name: quality_checklist
assertions.check: response.md contains '质量自检' section with checkboxes
